note: FP32 NLI (cross-encoder/nli-MiniLM2-L6-H768, model.onnx, 313MB). Real inference confirmed after fixing token_type_ids bug. P@K drop is soft-ground-truth artifact — NLI surfaces different entries than historical log. 15% of baseline top-5 have duplicate titles inflating baseline P@K. See fp32-3way-report.md.
FP32 NLI (cross-encoder/nli-deberta-v3-small, model.onnx, 541MB). Slower and slightly lower quality than MiniLM2 FP32. See fp32-3way-report.md.
